_readme: PHASE 3d COLLAPSE-IS-LOSS cycle, DOSE 2 (ladder8c2): IDENTICAL to ladder8c EXCEPT --all-fallen-loss -3.0 (was -1.0, which was TOO WEAK — training all-Fallen ROSE 22->77%, reach-30 fell 54->18%). Reward math for why -1.0 failed: dense ChangeVP telescopes to finalVP/30, so corrupt-to-12VP-then-collapse nets +0.4-1.0=-0.6 > stay-Good-and-lose-to-a-corrupting-copy (~-1.0), and even INSIDE a collapse the uniform penalty leaves the collapse-WINNER (-0.6) ahead of the loser (-0.9) so the gradient still rewarded corrupt-racing. At -3.0 the collapse-winner's -2.6 is strictly worse than stay-Good-and-lose (-1.0) — the game-theoretic condition that flips the best response even when the other 3 copies race, so a symmetric population can shift off collapse. ladder7 recipe + neuralSeats fix, warm ladder5 gen60, NO blocker (clean A/B). ladder8c (-1.0) data KEPT as the dose-response point. DISCRIMINATOR (team-lead): watch TRAINING reach-30% — if all-Fallen falls AND reach-30 RISES = cracked (engine gets its fair test); if all-Fallen falls but games pile at cap with reach-30 flat = path-2 (reaching 30 vs a corruptor field is unreachable) -> Michael evidence for 'corruption must cost tempo'. Also watch PPO KL/loss first gens (-3.0 is a bigger reward scale — if training destabilizes that's a value-fn-scale issue, flag it, not a verdict). If -3.0 flips trends -> run to 60 + pace-test. If gapEnd STILL flat with collapse suppressed -> training side conclusively exhausted.
